title: [codereview-pass1-chunk1] lookup_route method lacks full documentation and error handling for non-root case
description: Doc comment should specify 'root only' per lookup_route impl. Non-root returns None always but not documented. P3 style. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w.3
close_reason: Added root-only documentation to lookup_route in lichen-node/src/routing.rs:285 per codereview. Non-root None case now explicitly documented. Matches process_dao pattern. Only touched scoped file.
